ergonomic_discipline: ergonomics never compress disclosure of irreversibility or uncertainty
ergonomics never replace required dual-review with single-click flows
ergonomics never auto-default approval; default is always 'pending operator decision'

ergonomic_principles.rule: show at most one decision per checkpoint; defer secondary information to expandable detail
queues respect declared SLA tiers; no operator is auto-assigned beyond declared capacity ceiling
repeated escalations from the same trigger collapse into one tracked incident, not N notifications
reviewer registry declares per-reviewer concurrent claim ceiling
every screen states what is known, what is uncertain, and the next required action
checkpoints are presented in a single declared order; no parallel competing decision surfaces
